'''鈭歱-b-b''' ('''kapabab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knout|knout]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knout|knout]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-b-b
|-
! Lemma
| kapabab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipabab|thipabab]] || [[word:jipabab|jipabab]] || [[word:shipabab|shipabab]] || [[word:kipabab|kipabab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupabab|thuthupabab]] || [[word:jujupabab|jujupabab]] || [[word:shushupabab|shushupabab]] || [[word:kukupabab|kukupabab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupabab|thupabab]] || [[word:jupabab|jupabab]] || [[word:shupabab|shupabab]] || [[word:kupabab|kupabab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupabab|thupabab]] || [[word:jupabab|jupabab]] || [[word:shupabab|shupabab]] || [[word:kupabab|kupabab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepabab|thepabab]] || [[word:jepabab|jepabab]] || [[word:shepabab|shepabab]] || [[word:kepabab|kepabab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopabab|thothopabab]] || [[word:jojopabab|jojopabab]] || [[word:shoshopabab|shoshopabab]] || [[word:kokopabab|kokopabab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopabab|thopabab]] || [[word:jopabab|jopabab]] || [[word:shopabab|shopabab]] || [[word:kopabab|kopabab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopabab|thopabab]] || [[word:jopabab|jopabab]] || [[word:shopabab|shopabab]] || [[word:kopabab|kopabab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pabab|th忙pabab]] || [[word:j忙pabab|j忙pabab]] || [[word:sh忙pabab|sh忙pabab]] || [[word:k忙pabab|k忙pabab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapabab|thathapabab]] || [[word:jajapabab|jajapabab]] || [[word:shashapabab|shashapabab]] || [[word:kakapabab|kakapabab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapabab|thapabab]] || [[word:japabab|japabab]] || [[word:shapabab|shapabab]] || [[word:kapabab|kapabab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapabab|thapabab]] || [[word:japabab|japabab]] || [[word:shapabab|shapabab]] || [[word:kapabab|kapabab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapabab|shapabab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapabab|goshapabab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapabab|gokishapabab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapababn眉|shapababn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapababnkn眉|goshapababnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapababn眉|gokishapababn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapababsh毛|shapababsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapababnksh毛|goshapababnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapababsh毛|gokishapababsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapababro|shapababro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapababnkro|goshapababnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapababro|gokishapababro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapababmu|shapababmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapababnkmu|goshapababnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapababmu|gokishapababmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapababsher|shapababsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapababnksher|goshapababnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapababsher|gokishapababsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapababng|shapababng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapababnkng|goshapababnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapababng|gokishapababng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapababya|shapababya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapababnkya|goshapababnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapababya|gokishapababya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapababyam|shapababyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapababnkyam|goshapababnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapababyam|gokishapababyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapababn眉sh毛|shapababn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapababnkn眉sh毛|goshapababnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapababn眉sh毛|gokishapababn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapababn眉ro|shapababn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapababnkn眉ro|goshapababnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapababn眉ro|gokishapababn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapababn眉mu|shapababn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapababnkn眉mu|goshapababnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapababn眉mu|gokishapababn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapababsh毛n眉|shapababsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapababnksh毛n眉|goshapababnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapababsh毛n眉|gokishapababsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapababsh毛ro|shapababsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapababnksh毛ro|goshapababnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapababsh毛ro|gokishapababsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapababsh毛mu|shapababsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapababnksh毛mu|goshapababnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapababsh毛mu|gokishapababsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapababron眉|shapababron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapababnkron眉|goshapababnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapababron眉|gokishapababron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapababrosh毛|shapababrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapababnkrosh毛|goshapababnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapababrosh毛|gokishapababrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapababromu|shapababromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapababnkromu|goshapababnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapababromu|gokishapababromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapababmun眉|shapababmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapababnkmun眉|goshapababnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapababmun眉|gokishapababmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapababmush毛|shapababmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapababnkmush毛|goshapababnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapababmush毛|gokishapababmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapababmuro|shapababmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapababnkmuro|goshapababnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapababmuro|gokishapababmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
